channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: What Is Arc? The Stablecoin Blockchain From USDC Issuer Circle
item.description: Arc is a new layer-1 blockchain developed by USDC issuer Circle, designed specifically for stablecoin-native finance.

item.title: The Clarity Act took a step forward: State of Crypto
item.description: Unpacking Thursday's at-times contentious markup hearing.

item.title: Saylor signals BTC buy as retail holders get push on STRC dividend vote
item.description: Michael Saylor signaled another Bitcoin buy on Sunday while urging retail investors to vote on a proxy measure enabling semi-monthly STRC dividend payouts.

item.title: In accordance with the rsETH technical recovery plan, WETH LTVs on Aave V3 Ethereum Core, Ethereum Prime, Arbitrum, Base, Mantle, and Linea have been restored to their pre-incident values. WETH now operates as normal across all affected V3 deploym - x.com

item.title: Alleged Dream Market Admin Accused of Laundering Crypto Into Gold Bars The U.S. Department of Justice charged German citizen Owe Martin Andresen, the alleged main administrator of darknet marketplace Dream Market, with laundering more than $2 mill - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFB2WGJCb2tsYWpnTmNsOXNvTlBnR3FsMXprd2d3UllhLWw0STdSQkV6aUtOQ0NjQXR3YUZGbWduZk1MX3dSMklUNGtPbktSZFpaTVRjYlJTTGlVa1hlUkotRWdBaw?oc=5" target="_blank">Alleged Dream Market Admin Accus…

item.title: $ETH looks to be repeating the 2022 playbook. The bottom is not in yet. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9DOTYydWJXaGlUSWx5c2ZseUVWblloUGdmd0dpX1BIOGhtaXlPYWQyZnUwRkhIUzctS3p1eXJnaFBxVkgxQ3VyOWRjUmpzTWwwZVZ6enoxQTdkc18tdS04Ukhn?oc=5" target="_blank">$ETH looks to be repeating the 202…

item.title: 🔥 INSIGHT: SharpLink CEO says Ethereum could surge if the CLARITY Act passes, risk appetite returns, and tokenization accelerates. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5QZ0JvclVVUUVlbWRzMng0azVZbUhxUjNHUXd4SjJHN3VJMUpZdDlMSU4xbTNDYUFlWmxDamhGVlc3ZG1POWViTTh5Skh3dS1aTnZDWGFyQy10cVYyUG50cklLdDA?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 INSIGHT: SharpLink CEO says …

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin. "₿ig Dot Energy." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE0wVjdBRWRZSTUzUlowVGRGUkdQUHVFNGRQSWZ0YWROdVZld1Z6LUQ1VlVDSDZjeUJiR1E2cDhHRDI0TVlDVEFfUm9ndUlfck5LMExURUpISGN5S19uOTl3Q1N3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at b…

item.title: DeFi's new front: VerifiedX bets bitcoin's next chapter is programmable, private
item.description: VerifiedX says its Bitcoin sidechain enables programmable, privacy-preserving transactions without synthetic wrappers, targeting growing institutional demand for native DeFi on the original blockchain system.

item.title: Japan's SBI Securities, Rakuten Securities plan to offer crypto investment trusts
item.description: Another 11 companies responded to a survey saying they would consider offering crypto funds once the regulatory environment becomes clear.

item.title: SBI, Rakuten, Nomura line up to launch crypto investment trusts: Report
item.description: Japan’s biggest brokerages are racing to bring crypto investment trusts to retail investors, as regulators move to formally allow crypto-holding funds by 2028.

item.title: "This time is different.” Nick from @coinbureau on why crypto’s market structure has fundamentally changed. #BinanceOnline - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE9VYVBVamlrRHNZaS1pSU91a2lXeEVHLU5DcnZUMXFvRkNMRjNCak9kTEdVZkpXWEhaNVZ3dDBiUTJDeWRKRHBQUTk4bTNLTXB6R2NuMHVFVGhzanZx?oc=5" target="_blank">"This time is different.” Nick from @coinb…

item.title: Bitcoin slides below $79K on macro fears: Can fixed-income outflows save it?
item.description: While macro pain and Iran war uncertainty drag Bitcoin below $79K, fixed-income market outflows could trigger a medium-term Bitcoin rebound.

item.title: Italy’s largest bank more than doubles crypto holdings to $235M in Q1: Report
item.description: Intesa Sanpaolo grew its crypto holdings from $100 million to $235 million in Q1 2026, making first-time moves into Ethereum and XRP while nearly exiting Solana entirely.

item.title: A Russian stablecoin built to dodge sanctions says it can survive even if they're lifted
item.description: A7A5, the Russia-linked stablecoin built to move money around banking restrictions, says faster trade settlement, yield and regional crypto infrastructure could keep it relevant even if geopolitical tensions ease.

item.title: 🇯🇵 BIG: Japan’s biggest brokers are preparing to sell crypto investment funds. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1zZ2RnaC14X2N3MW41TFMxLWpidzF6b2FVdno5WWJzdzhHSXBqMkhkOGZQTHh3U092MVJPYmk5TVFiM2NOTVpjUEZBeEF4aFhGekttR2lka0Qzc0tvWFlpYmlReXc?oc=5" target="_blank">🇯🇵 BIG: Japan’s biggest broke…

item.title: Michael Saylor floated Bitcoin sales idea to avoid 'impairing' the asset
item.description: Strategy executive chairman Michael Saylor said that continuing to use the “never sell” Bitcoin mantra could ultimately undermine the very asset his company is built around.

item.title: “CLARITY will be signed into law.” 🇺🇸 CFTC Chairman says that the crypto market structure bill is going to pass. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1ScDM3V3B5S2lJZHZISnVzYjI0Nkt6Rlh2QTJWTVF1VHhDTTdtUEFiSkpCTndxY280emNSdHBrZzQyblZUakFwcnd2M29hWUtvaTBxbWI2N3dMN2QtVS1EMmdR?oc=5" target="_blank">“CLARITY will be signed into law.”…

item.title: US CLARITY Act will be a ‘boon for domestic innovation’: A16z
item.description: A16z crypto said that when US legal frameworks strike a balance between innovation and consumer protection, the impact tends to ripple through into global markets.

item.title: Bitcoin $BTC is overheating! The average trader's realized profit margin has reached 17%. To me, this is a major warning sign: for the first time since October 2025, the average investor is sitting on substantial gains and may be looking to exit. What stands out t - x.com

item.title: STRC preferred stock investors are mispricing major 'dislocation' risk: Analyst
item.description: Potential liquidity contractions in secondary markets and surging government bond yields could spell trouble for preferred perpetual stockholders.

item.title: JUST IN: Poland's parliament approves a bill placing its crypto market under the EU's MiCA framework, granting the Polish Financial Supervisory Authority powers to supervise, sanction and temporarily block crypto accounts and transactions. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFBCcWhPN1c3Z1Bpd1JEZm5OSm1lcXAyOHlpaXBtb2ZzNV9xN1VKR2QtMTF0N3BpVThBLXZxdGxoSl9rbmNsbk9lZG8tS1FBY0M0U2Q1WEQ0NFpZUE1BNmc?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Poland's parliament approves a…

item.title: Strategy to repurchase $1.5B of 2029 convertible notes
item.description: The notes carry a 0% coupon, but can be converted into equity in the company if holders choose to redeem their notes for shares.

item.title: Shoutout to the crypto scammers & spammers: thanks to you, we’re banning your entire network today. They've picked friday midnight with a purpose, but they didn't know that I **always** work. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5rY0pvN2xFN2hXRUFkQ2Z2bVdhWTIzMENvbTlYZS1aTkN1Rm41VVZKenBLTEU5Y29iTzU0cmFycFNOLWpQUDlQeFZDOVZUNkxrNlpQcWMtT3Y5Qm8xWURzUHl5SQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Shoutout to the crypto scammers …

item.title: Justin Sun-Led Liberland Micronation Awards Ethereum Founder Vitalik Buterin Its Top Honor
item.description: The micronation honored Vitalik Buterin during ETH Prague 2026 as it continued promoting blockchain-based governance and digital citizenship.

item.title: Everyone expects new lows for #Bitcoin. Bitcoin is up 25% from its recent lows after the war in the Middle-East started and a new high in Yields. That's strength, not weakness. That's the actual reason why you should be looking into Bitcoin rather than other ass - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFB4cHFRcFhKRUx6blRRd0I0cFRqeHlvQUpwWC1HU0QzYjBzemNfQVRraGZGUzh5cHpHMkRUdC1TTU5iYXhWck1KNmszaFFabk5FajhHdTdNQ0h3RTlpYzExVU5hcw?oc=5" target="_blank">Everyone expects new lows for #B…

item.title: Bitcoin analysis sees 'bear trap' as BTC price passes two-week lows under $78K
item.description: Bitcoin fell below $78,000 for the first time since the start of May, but traders refused to give up hope of a BTC price rebound coming next.

item.title: HUGE: 🔥 🇺🇸 Fed will inject $9,860,000,000 into the economy next week. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9IVzZxYmxGb1oyLXFQbHhTUjhYeC1pN2FMeklzTDk0WE5ScnFxZDVPa0xGOGZhbEk0OHB6SVFuNXF1OEp1cXUyaXdrOXpnUzRtaWN1ZEJCTkl4Q01hOWtGNkp3?oc=5" target="_blank">HUGE: 🔥 🇺🇸 Fed will inject $9,8…

item.title: Jump Crypto’s ‘Firedancer’ is taking a slow and steady approach to its long-awaited Solana infrastructure rollout
item.description: In an interview with CoinDesk, the lead engineer at Firedancer gives an update on how the new client, also known as a software, is fairing in the Solana ecosystem.

item.title: OpenAI partners with Malta to give all citizens free ChatGPT Plus access
item.description: In a world-first deal, OpenAI and Malta will give all citizens free ChatGPT Plus for a year after they complete a government-backed AI literacy course.

item.title: Crypto users are choosing juicy yields over protection, putting billions at risk of hacks
item.description: DeFi insurance protocols debuted with huge ambitions during the 2020 crypto boom. But as hacks evolved and users chased yields over protection, most of the sector collapsed under the same risks it was built to cover.

item.title: What Is AI Jailbreaking? A Beginner's Guide to the Cat-and-Mouse Game Behind Every Chatbot
item.description: From Cydia to ChatGPT, jailbreaking went from cracking iPhones to liberating LLMs. Here's how it works, who's doing it, and why every AI lab is losing sleep.

item.title: The $293 million KelpDAO hack shows why DeFi is finally being forced to grow up
item.description: For protocol founders and security researchers, the incident reinforced a broader shift underway across crypto: DeFi is no longer primarily battling coding bugs. It’s battling complexity.

item.title: 🔥 FUN FACT: Bitcoin has become less volatile than potato futures. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9rQjZoYzR5S1V3c0NoWVBNRnNBNGplcEZod2kzdkdPNFFoVXhSdUlrdXdIU3JfOGw0QU9SY2tnY0tqWEdjZHJnNEEzMkR2VHlxdUNYTkNYUlN3VTNNeXBBekVWY2w?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 FUN FACT: Bitcoin has become…

item.title: XRP beat bitcoin gains as Clarity Act advanced, but a real bullrun still needs Congress
item.description: The token jumped 5% after a Senate committee moved the market-structure bill forward, reviving hopes that legal clarity can pull deeper institutional money into XRP products.

item.title: THORChain confirms $10M exploit, rolls out recovery portal for affected users
item.description: THORChain has launched a recovery portal following a $10 million exploit, allowing affected users across four chains to revoke malicious approvals and claim refunds.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin falls under $78,000 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1fYlZwSWV5Y3ZweW9ZemJwM2lMMlNsYk1HQ3JpWTVWblpleERma3FxODZMc0J3VFhWdFJwVjZBcS16U3BRSjl6WGllVVRfbC1zZEFSRDVWazEzS2hrc1dQQU1R?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin falls under $78,0…

item.title: Sharplink CEO points out 3 catalysts for Ethereum's price to surge higher
item.description: The rest of the world is “really closely” watching the US CLARITY Act as the nation moves further away from the previous “hostile stance,” according to Sharplink’s chief.

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs bleed $1B in a week, snapping six-week inflow run
item.description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs shed $1 billion in a single week as capital rotated toward AI stocks and macro uncertainty weighed on sentiment, ending a six-week run that had pulled in $3.4 billion.

item.title: Crypto longs lose $500 million as bitcoin slides to $78,000, SOL and XRP down 5%
item.description: A long-skewed liquidation cascade flushed leverage across the major tokens overnight, with the move tracking a global bond selloff and the worst session for U.S. stocks since March.

item.title: Bhutan ‘doesn’t recall’ selling any bitcoin, disputing widely tracked $1 billion BTC drawdown
item.description: Arkham Intelligence data shows that over $1 billion in bitcoin has left wallets attributed to Bhutan in the past year, flowing to exchanges and trading firms. The country says it has not sold any.

item.title: US CLARITY Act brings ‘major spike of euphoria’ to Bitcoin: Santiment
item.description: Santiment warned that the crypto market “typically” moves against crowd expectations, pointing to a recent rise in bullish sentiment driven by renewed momentum around the US CLARITY Act.

item.title: House committee leaders urge Trump to nominate CFTC members, citing CLARITY Act
item.description: The US Commodity Futures Trading Commission is currently headed by Chair Michael Selig, with no public statement from Donald Trump about fully staffing the five-member panel of commissioners.

item.title: Bitcoin Depot filing casts doubt on company’s future amid lawsuits
item.description: The crypto ATM company reported financial difficulties amid a changing regulatory environment and ongoing litigation, which have cost it millions of dollars.

item.title: ICE, CME press US regulators to 'rein in' Hyperliquid energy trading: Report
item.description: The Hyperliquid decentralized exchange allows anyone who stakes 500,000 HYPE tokens, valued at roughly $22.2 million, to deploy new markets.

item.title: U.S. House lawmakers who oversee the CFTC are urging Trump to fill the commission
item.description: As the Commodity Futures Trading Commission takes on a growing task to police U.S. crypto trading, senior lawmakers are saying it needs bipartisan leadership.

item.title: Solayer launches Visa-compatible card for USDC payments
item.description: The new card lets users spend USDC balances through online, in-store and contactless transactions while accessing ATM withdrawals in supported regions.

item.title: Drake Calls for Sam Bankman-Fried's Release in New, Critically Panned Album
item.description: Rapper Drake released three new albums on Friday, and described himself on one as “a BTC crypto big-timer.”

item.title: Lombard Finance Dumps LayerZero, Will Use Chainlink to Power $1 Billion in Bitcoin Assets
item.description: The Bitcoin DeFi protocol is moving its assets away from LayerZero following the Kelp DAO exploit that led to the loss of $292 million.

item.title: Hyperliquid Policy Arm Rejects Market Integrity Concerns Amid Oil Futures Surge
item.description: Decentralized exchange Hyperliquid has become a popular destination for speculating on oil prices.

item.title: SpaceX targets June 11 IPO pricing, picks Nasdaq for historic market debut
item.description: Elon Musk’s rocket and satellite company has accelerated plans for its blockbuster public offering, with trading expected to begin as early as June 12 after a faster-than-expected SEC review.

item.title: President Trump Discloses Coinbase, Robinhood and Bitcoin Mining Stock Trades
item.description: President Donald Trump reported trades in crypto firms like Coinbase and Robinhood, among others, according to new ethics filings.

item.title: Packs of Empty Waymos Are Weirding Out Atlanta Neighborhood
item.description: Residents in northwest Atlanta say empty Waymo robotaxis have spent weeks repeatedly circling residential streets early in the morning.

item.title: ChatGPT Can Now See Your Bank Account—Here's What That Actually Means
item.description: OpenAI launched a personal finance tool that connects ChatGPT to your bank accounts, giving spending advice based on your actual habits.

item.title: US law firm files motion requesting redistribution of $344M USDt linked to Iran
item.description: Law firm Gerstein Harrow LLP is attempting to claim frozen cryptocurrency funds for claimants of unrelated judgments stretching back decades.

item.title: Bitcoin Depot Flashes Bankruptcy Warning as ATM Revenue Falls, Regulatory Scrutiny Grows
item.description: Bitcoin Depot issued a “going concern” warning, signaling severe uncertainty over its ability to survive the next 12 months.

item.title: We turn Bitcoin into Money. $STRC - x.com
item.description: We turn Bitcoin into Money. $STRC
